prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-JEWEL-HAMMER-7-FBA Product Type: HAMMER_MALLET Brand (from catalog): Universal Hobby Existing Title: Universal Hobby 7pc Specialty Double-Ended Jewelry Hammer Set with Display Stand, Artisan Jewelry Making Tools Description: A fantastic jewelers double-ended specialty hammer set for all your design and crafting needs. Beautifully organized and able to be kept tidy on the included wood display stand, it will fit right in with all your other tools in your studio, workshop or crafting area. All hammers included in the set feature a wooden handle and metal head. The hammer set is multifunctional but, is predominantly intended for jewelers and jewelry design, for texturing metal, hammering doming punches or forming small pieces metal.

Your jewelers double-ended specialty hammer set includes seven specialty hammers:

Designer Hammer: (3") 72 mm Long Head and Striking face Dia (0.75") 18.5mm - One side Cross-Hatch Texture Design and other side flat

Planishing Hammer: (2.1/2") 63mm Long Head and Striking face Dia (0.50") 13mm Once Side Bowed -Domed and other side flat

Embossing Hammer: (2.1/2") 65mm Long Head and Striking Face Dia (9/64") 3.5mm one side and other side (11/64") 4.5mm

Embossing Hammer: (2.1/2")65mm Long Head and Striking Face Dia (9/32") 7mm one side and other side (23/64") 9mm

Wide Raising Hammer: (2.1/2")65mm Long Head and Striking Face Dia - (5/32" x 33/64" ) 4mm x 13mm one side and other side (15/64"x17/32") 6mm x 13.5mm

Narrow Raising Hammer: (2.1/2")65mm Long Head and Striking Face Dia - (15/128" x 33/64" ) 3mm x 13mm one side and other side (5/32"x35/64") 4mm

Sharp Designer Hammer: (3") 72 mm Long Head and Striking face Dia (5/64" x 37/64" ) 2mm x 14.5mm one side and other side (5/32"x37/64") 4mm x 14.5mm

Let the designing begin. Search Terms: complete jewelry making small artisan hammers craft jewelry metal forging art gifts for women adult hobby kits artist supplies jewelry making kit arts and crafts mothers day gifts texturizing hammer for jewelry making metal forming goldsmith metalworking tools handmade Features: - PROFESSIONAL JEWELERS HAMMERS: Texturizing hammers set for jewelry design is a specialty hammer set jewelry making kit that includes seven unique double sided hammers; Ideal for handmade jewelry or other creative crafting projects - JEWELRY HAMMER SET: Seven double sided specialty hobby hammers includes (2) embossing hammers, (1) designer hammer, (1) planishing hammer, (1) wide raising hammer, (1) narrow raising hammer and (1) sharp designer hammer - ARTISAN METAL WORKING TOOLS: Ideal craft and hobby hammer set is intended for jewelry making, the hammer set can also be used for metal forming or metal working tools for texturing metal, hammering doming punches or forming small pieces of lightweight precious metals - DISPLAY SHELF: Jewelry hammer set comes with wooden display stand to keep chasing hammers and texturing hammers neatly organized; display shelf makes it easy to reach hammers for when you’re busy creating - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 9 x 0.5 x 0.5 inches; Weight: 2.12; Materials: Wood handle and chrome plated head === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Hobby 7-pc Specialty Double-Ended Jewelry Hammer Set
